data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Product-only purchases', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions various offerings, including services bundled with products, but there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the ability to make product-only purchases. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary functionality is not validated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the requirement for 'Product-only purchases' is satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
